name: Tools Membership
description: Access to all private tools and cookie checkers with license
long_description:
🛠️ Tools Membership
• Private channel access for all current and future tools.
• Includes 10+ working cookie checkers.
• Each member gets personal license (no source, only .exe).
• Tools may take time — not daily posts.
• Limited to 15 members max.
requirements: Tools are .exe only. No source code. Active license provided. Not suitable for mobile use.

name: Cookie Membership
description: Private cookie drops not posted elsewhere
long_description:
🍪 Cookie Membership
• Private cookies from multiple sites.
• Drops every 3–4 days (minimum).
• These are not posted in public or other channels.
• Max 5 members only.
requirements: Drops based on what’s extracted. No direct requests. Quality over quantity.

name: GPT Membership (Cookie Only)
description: Access GPT via cookie with limited daily usage
long_description:
🤖 GPT Cookie Plan
• Use GPT through browser cookies.
• Limit: 1 cookie every 2 days.
• Replacement if expired.
• Works only on browser (Firefox preferred).
requirements: Cookies are browser-based only. No sharing or misuse. Replacement only within limits.

name: Netflix TV Membership
description: Monthly Netflix access for TV (HD or UHD)
long_description:
📺 Netflix TV Plan
• HD Plan available.
• UHD Plan available.
• For TV access only.
• Setup support is not provided.
requirements: TV setup is your own responsibility. No guide or help will be given. Access only, no cookie sharing.
